findingVerification.notes: The benchmark warden.toml explicitly sets defaults.verification.enabled = true.

traceCapture.notes: Run used --traces on all shards. The 9fc06de5 shard had three no-finding extraction errors; those exact chunks were repaired with traced targeted reruns before aggregation.

notes: Full benchmark result stitched from one Warden run per corpus SHA using --runtime pi --model openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash --effort xhigh --traces. Each shard analyzes every unique corpus path for that SHA, not the whole Sentry repository. The 9fc06de5 shard had three no-finding extraction errors; only those exact failed chunks were replaced from a clean traced repair run. The repair run also found a Perforce issue in an originally successful chunk, but that finding is intentionally excluded to avoid cherry-picking a second pass. Raw JSONL artifacts are withheld pending sensitive-data review; committed traceSummaries retain sanitized per-chunk metadata only.

scoring.notes: Agent-verified semantic matches. A finding counts when it identifies the same bug in roughly the same location as an existing corpus finding. Same-file findings about different bugs do not count; duplicate findings map to one unique corpus ID.

scores.notes: Internal EA features endpoint auth bypass.
Finds cleartext option logging on an earlier shard, not the 2d system-options allowlist-comma corpus bug.
Finds password data stored in the session, not the auth-index superuser reauth corpus bug.
Accept-invite token validation/delete fall-through.
Timing-unsafe compare finding is not the Statsig timestamp freshness corpus bug.
Statsig webhook lacks timestamp freshness.
Bitbucket Server webhook lacks signature verification.
Jira Server webhook JWT bearer token is logged.
Release webhook token uses uuid1.
External issue action host injection is not the corpus event-scope bug.
Seer RPC HMAC omits URL binding.
Legacy Jira plugin disables TLS verification.
Reverse-tabnabbing finding is not the Autofix URL protocol or host allowlist corpus bug.
Mobile builds ECharts tooltip renders unescaped metadata.
Accept-invite token validation/delete fall-through on the 9fc shard.
Discover saved-query visit skips object permissions.
External team lookup scopes only by organization.
Unlink identity deletes by external_id without ownership.
Shared Slack-channel unlink authorization issue is not in the corpus.
MS Teams audience-option gap differs from the corpus group-organization scoping bug.
Slack Seer autofix access check differs from the corpus Slack rule and starred-segment bugs.
Data export notification endpoint lacks PubSub verification.
Replay DELETE accepts project:read.
Sentry App issue-action SSRF/host injection is not the corpus event JSON access bug.
Sentry App cell service user optionality drops project access.
User merge verification code expiry is not enforced.
System options PUT logs cleartext credential values.
